subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified be Thou, O my God! I am Thy servant and the son of Thy servant, and I have departed from my homeland out of love for Thy Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انا عبدک و ابن عبدک و قد خرجت من وطنی حبا لجمالک و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God
